creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

at this time we know that many ports don't work with clang. Reporting 
individual ports does not yet help as we have automated ways of 
detecting (and classifying) the problem. Please read 
http://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsAndClang  some help that does currently 
help is submitting clang reports with patches. Don't be discouraged from 
reporting other bugs though!
